textByHash.e5021ed46877c2b970e23f8b1c9bd61859e0a919: I wish these grapes could pick themselves.
textByHash.41b2754216283184b9e793fd5865541e44919d8e: The grapes are in good shape for this harvest.
textByHash.3d64a1f4ad3fea4e14094ea4107348f1f2b4cae4: I'm sorry, but the vineyards need tending to.
textByHash.6034cfef276252b78535f33d80d78a1be0e68874: Have you tried the wine? You won't regret it if you do!
